name: codex-quota-lens
description: Local-first Codex quota dashboard with an MCP Apps UI, burn-rate analytics, and usage planning.

interface.shortDescription: Open an interactive Codex quota and usage-planning panel.
interface.longDescription: Open an MCP Apps dashboard inside supported Codex conversations, read numeric quota and token telemetry from local Codex sessions, identify the fastest usage periods, and estimate depletion risk without uploading conversation content.
defaultPrompt: 打开 Codex Quota Lens 额度面板。
打开速度面板，分析我什么时候用得最快。
打开规划器，按模型和推理强度规划额度。
